label: Closed app-server + codex-toys
description: Headless Codex app-server run where codex-toys CLI, plugins, skills, workbench, feed, and toybox surfaces are explicitly available.
affordances: codex-toys CLI from the repository checkout
Workbench, feed, dispatch, delegation, threads, and toybox commands
Repo-local codex-toys plugin and skill docs
promptAddendum: You may use codex-toys repository affordances when they are useful: workbench doctor/overview/run, workbench dispatch run-due, feed item append, feed dispatch, threads locate/inspect, workflow run, delegation, and the local plugin skill docs. Do not use codex exec as the benchmark surface.
